name: Vinyl-Coated Scissor Lockout Hasp — 6-Hole
shortDescription: Chrome-polished scissor hasp with vinyl-coated jaw for secure multi-person lockout.
longDescription: Scissor-type metal hasp with the lower jaw vinyl-coated for a de-electrified, non-slip grip, and six holes so up to six technicians can each apply their own padlock before work starts — nobody can re-energise the equipment until every lock is removed. Available in small (25mm jaw) and premier (38mm jaw) sizes, colour-coded in red, yellow, green and blue for department or hazard-type identification.

images.alt: Vinyl-Coated Scissor Lockout Hasp — 6-Hole supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
